title: Qiryathayim #7156
definition:
Kiriathaim = "two cities"

 1) a city east of the Jordan in Moab
 2) a town in Naphtali allotted to the Gershonite Levites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kiriathaim = "two cities"

 1) a city east of the Jordan in Moab
 2) a town in Naphtali allotted to the Gershonite Levites

    NASB:  a city in Moab, also a place in Naphtali
